roles.title: Strategy and Business Operations Director
roles.company_description: Enterprise SaaS talent management and learning platform. ~4,000 employees. PE-backed by Clearlake Capital.
roles.why_matches: Remote Director-level strategy + ops role at a PE-backed SaaS company; comp hits Tyler's full target range; MBA + consulting background is the exact profile.

roles.title: Director, Business Operations, Portfolio, and Strategy
roles.company_description: Global payments network and financial services leader. $200B+ market cap. ~25,000 employees. Austin TX office.
roles.why_matches: Functions as Chief of Staff to VP of People Technology — portfolio strategy, business operations, and stakeholder management scope precisely matches Tyler's Deloitte + MBA background.

roles.why_matches: Reports to COO, drives enterprise-wide business growth strategy and innovation — comp ($273K-$303K base + 65% bonus) is well above target range for the right candidate.

roles.why_matches: Broad pool of Director Analytics roles where Tyler's data fluency (Python, SQL) plus strategy and operations background creates a genuine differentiator over pure analytics hires.

roles.company_description: Active pool of remote VP of Operations roles at tech/SaaS companies nationally, many Austin-affiliated. Roles oversee Finance, People, Talent, and Business Operations.
roles.why_matches: VP-level scope with cross-functional operations ownership; MBA + consulting leadership profile is a common requirement at this level.

roles.title: Chief of Staff (103 open roles — aggregate)
roles.company_description: 103 Chief of Staff roles in Austin, Texas metropolitan area as of April 2026 per LinkedIn, with 3 newly posted. Strong pipeline of startup and growth-stage CoS openings.
roles.why_matches: Deep active pipeline of CoS roles in Austin; as of April 2026 the market is actively refreshing with new postings weekly.

roles.title: Director of Strategy & Operations (864 open roles — aggregate)
roles.company_description: 864 Director of Strategy jobs in Austin, TX as of April 2026 per Glassdoor. Average salary $139,341; top of range $218,841. Includes tech, healthcare, finance, and enterprise sectors.
roles.why_matches: Exceptionally deep market; Director-level strategy roles in Austin are at record volume in April 2026, well-suited to Tyler's ex-Deloitte / MBA profile.

market_signals.temperature_notes: 864 Director of Strategy, 103 Chief of Staff, and 151 Director Analytics roles active in Austin metro as of April 2026. Remote demand strong nationally with 42,000+ remote strategy roles on LinkedIn. Market is competitive but actively hiring; Director+ roles require 8-15 years with clear cross-functional execution track record.

salary_trends.ai_fluency_premium: Tech-fluent candidates (Python, AI workflows) commanding 10-20% premium in 2026

top_3_picks.title: Strategy and Business Operations Director
top_3_picks.reason: Remote, $150K-$240K confirmed published range, PE-backed SaaS — MBA + consulting + cross-functional ops is the exact required profile. Strongest comp/fit combo this week.

top_3_picks.title: Director, Business Operations, Portfolio, and Strategy
top_3_picks.reason: Austin in-person at enterprise scale; CoS-level scope to VP of People Technology covering portfolio strategy and business operations; brand name carries.

top_3_picks.title: Chief of Staff to CEO
top_3_picks.reason: Austin-based and remote; direct CEO partnership on strategic planning and change management at a profitable SaaS — low political overhead, high execution ownership.

summary.recommendation: Lead with Cornerstone OnDemand (best published comp + remote flexibility + PE-backed SaaS scope). Visa is the top Austin in-person play with enterprise credibility. SamCart and Dandy are strong Austin CoS options with direct CEO access. With 864 Director of Strategy and 103 CoS roles actively listed in Austin alone, the pipeline is strong — Tyler's Python/AI fluency should be foregrounded in every application where tech-adjacent work appears in JD.
